revenue.label: Total Revenue (GMV)
revenue.description: Total gross merchandise volume including product price and freight charges.

aov.label: Average Order Value
aov.description: The average amount spent per order.

on_time_delivery_rate.label: On-Time Delivery Rate
on_time_delivery_rate.description: Percentage of orders delivered to the customer before or on the estimated delivery date.
on_time_delivery_rate.sql_formula: CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN order_delivered_customer_date <= order_estimated_delivery_date THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) / COUNT(*) * 100

avg_review_score.label: Average Review Score
avg_review_score.description: The mean rating given by customers in their reviews (1 to 5).

cancellation_rate.label: Order Cancellation Rate
cancellation_rate.description: Percentage of total orders that were canceled.
cancellation_rate.sql_formula: CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN order_status = 'canceled' THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) / COUNT(*) * 100

freight_ratio.label: Freight-to-Price Ratio
freight_ratio.description: The proportion of total cost attributed to shipping charges.

avg_payment_installments.label: Average Payment Installments
avg_payment_installments.description: The average number of installments chosen by customers for payments.

top_categories_by_revenue.label: Top Product Categories by Revenue
top_categories_by_revenue.description: Ranking of product categories based on total generated revenue.
top_categories_by_revenue.sql_formula: SELECT t.product_category_name_english, SUM(oi.price + oi.freight_value) as revenue FROM order_items oi JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id JOIN product_category_name_translation t ON p.product_category_name = t.product_category_name GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

customer_geographic_concentration.label: Customer Geographic Concentration
customer_geographic_concentration.description: Distribution of customers across different Brazilian states.
customer_geographic_concentration.sql_formula: SELECT customer_state, COUNT(DISTINCT customer_unique_id) as customer_count FROM customers GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC
